_notes: Crystal starters from Prof. Elm in New Bark Town.

starters.name: Cyndaquil
starters.advantage: Trivializes Bugsy (Bug). Decent into Jasmine (Steel). Struggles vs Whitney (Normal) and Pryce (Ice via Piloswine ground).

starters.name: Totodile
starters.advantage: Crushes Falkner with Water Gun (no, wait — neutral; use Mud-Slap from a Geodude instead). Wrecks Jasmine, Pryce, Brock. Bite + Scary Face is strong vs Morty.

starters.name: Chikorita
starters.advantage: Hard mode. Loses to Falkner, Bugsy, Morty, Chuck (sort of), Jasmine. Wins vs Pryce, second half of Kanto rock/water.

rival_starter_logic: Rival picks the type-disadvantaged starter against yours: pick Cyndaquil → rival picks Totodile (water beats fire); pick Totodile → rival picks Chikorita; pick Chikorita → rival picks Cyndaquil.
